eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Worth, MO; at 05:15 PM ON APR 23, 2026 Effective until 07:15 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: SEVERE THUNDERSTORM WARNING. Storm contains rain, hail and strong winds. Thunderstorms were located along a line extending from Hopkins to near Rulo moving east at 25mph. Take precautions.
